narrative:
Washington 2A (precinct in Fayette County) has 428 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.1 percentage points.
